---
title: "LRP57: Mechanism model — expressive vocabulary (E) -> word reading (W)"

date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

{{< include _partials/_header.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_setup.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_convergence.qmd >}}

## Overview

LRP57 estimates the adjusted association $f^E$ between expressive vocabulary and word reading,
using all three phase transitions.

## Adjustment set

- $G$ — standard confounder (linear, one coefficient $\beta_G$).
- $A$ — standard confounder, conditioned on **linearly by default**: a
  $\gamma_A\,z(\text{age})$ term enters whenever age is a declared confounder and
  the age GP is off. The nonparametric age-GP flag is **off by default**; re-enable
  via `ModelSpec.extra={"use_age_gp": True}` for a smooth-age sensitivity fit.
- $R$ — *must* be conditioned on: $R \to E$ and $R \to W$, so $R$ opens a backdoor path.
- $W_{\text{pre}}$ — baseline.

$F$, $L$, $P$, $B$ are either descendants of $E$ or lie on post-$E$ mediation
paths. Conditioning on them would block legitimate indirect effects and
change the estimand toward a direct-only component, so they are **not** in the
adjustment set.

### Interpretation caveats

- NUCA applies to $(E_{\text{post}}, W_{\text{post}})$ and is not testable.
- $E_{\text{post}}$ is measured with error; attenuation applies as in LRP56.

![Model diagram](model_graph.png){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

{{< include _partials/_priors.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_prior_predictive.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_diagnostics.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_results_mechanism.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/_footer.qmd >}}
